zh.lifeSummary: 當Albert Johnson Hodges於1618年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿德斯托可時，他的父親John Twigg Hodges "Captain"22歲，母親Mary Miller13歲。他於1638年與Ellianore Dunnington在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1688年在美國維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪查爾斯 希迪享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hodges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hodge with genitival or post-medieval -s. Occasionally, however, the name may be topographic for a person who lived or worked at the house of someone named Hodge or Roger.

variants.name: Hodge
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Hogge, a rhyming pet form of Roger . In The Canterbury Tales, Chaucer's cook, ‘highte Hogge of Ware’, is invoked ‘Now tell on, Roger …’. Since Middle English spellings of the personal name are often impossible to distinguish from the nickname Hog(ge) ‘hog’, some early examples may be variants of Hogg .

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Johnson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, meaning originally ‘son of John’ and in modern times sometimes bestowed with precisely this meaning.

en.lifeSummary: When Albert Johnson Hodges was born in 1618, in Adstock, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Twigg Hodges "Captain", was 22 and his mother, Mary Miller, was 13. He married Ellianore Dunnington in 1638, in Henrico, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1688, in Charles City, Charles City County, Virginia, United States, at the age of 70.

Il a épousé Ellianore Dunnington en 1638, à Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1688, à Charles City, Charles City County, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Albert Johnson Hodgesが1618年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアドストックで生まれた時，父John Twigg Hodges "Captain"は22歳，母Mary Millerは13歳であった。1638年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコでEllianore Dunningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1688年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイチャーレス シトイで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albert Johnson Hodges(이)가 1618년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Twigg Hodges "Captain"(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Miller(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1638년 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Ellianore Dunnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1688년 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티 찰스 시티에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albert Johnson Hodges родился в 1618 г. в местности адстокк, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Twigg Hodges "Captain" было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Miller, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellianore Dunnington в 1638 г. в местности хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1688 г. в местности чарльс сити, чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет.
